title: 10 best herbal tinctures for bruises
description: Lemon verbena tinctures helps with bruises because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties, which quickly reduce swelling and ease pain. The herb's flavonoids and terpenes also promote blood flow to the affected area, accelerating the removal of damaged cells and reducing the appearance of discoloration.
